title: When Reviewing Past Events: - List Surprises: Note Things That Were Unexpected at the
subtitle: Challenge Hindsight Bias
description:
When reviewing past events:
- List surprises: Note things that were unexpected at the time.
- Avoid ‘should haves’: Focus on decisions made with the information you had then.
- Compare predictions: Look back at what you expected versus what happened.

Example: After a project, review what you thought would happen and compare it to the outcome.

faq.question: How do I track my progress with this habit?
faq.answer: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.

faq.question: What if I miss a day or forget to do this habit?
faq.answer: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.

howTo.title: Create a time-stamped prediction note
howTo.summary: Open the Brali LifeOS app and create a time-stamped note titled 'Prediction — [Event name]'. This should include your expected outcomes and metrics.

howTo.title: List unexpected surprises
howTo.summary: After the event, document three surprises that occurred. Use numeric descriptors to quantify each surprise and note how they diverged from your predictions.

howTo.title: Assign reversible actions
howTo.summary: For each surprise, identify one immediate reversible action you can take within 48 hours. Assign ownership and set a due date for these actions.

howTo.title: Review and analyze outcomes
howTo.summary: Compare your predictions with actual outcomes. Analyze the surprises to understand where your expectations diverged from reality and what can be improved.

howTo.title: Check in with LifeOS Brali app
howTo.summary: Log your results and reflections in the Brali LifeOS app. Use the insights gained to inform future decisions and improve your review process. Visit https://metalhatscats.com/life-os/hindsight-bias-coach/
